meta.purpose: Complete structured JSON prompt for building the /business page as a static Astro page. Every field contains real production copy — no placeholders. This is a B2B-focused page for schools, IT resellers, and repair shops.
meta.templateNote: This page uses a hybrid layout combining RepairLandingTemplate components with a unique BulkBuybackSection. Section order: Hero → Services Grid → Bulk Buyback → Model Categories → Why Choose Us → Ways to Save → Locations → FAQ. No breadcrumbs. No TableOfContents.

constraints.framework: Astro — static HTML only, zero client-side JavaScript
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS with semantic design tokens from the project design system
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library imports
constraints.images: Use with loading='lazy', explicit width/height, descriptive alt text
constraints.interactivity: Use native <details>/<summary> for FAQ accordion — no JS
constraints.seo: Single <h1>, canonical URL, JSON-LD (FAQPage), meta robots index/follow

seo.titleTag: Business & Wholesale Device Repair | Mobile Tech Lab Winnipeg
seo.metaDescription: B2B device repair and buyback for schools, IT resellers, and repair shops. Volume pricing, free shipping, and fleet trade-in programs. No minimums.

mainEntity.name: Is there a minimum order for volume pricing?

acceptedAnswer.text: No minimum. We welcome any volume, from a handful of devices to hundreds. Volume pricing applies automatically—the more you send, the more you save.
We offer free one-way shipping on all B2B orders. Choose a prepaid label to send devices to us, or we'll cover return shipping back to you—whichever works best for your workflow.

mainEntity.name: What devices do you repair for businesses?

acceptedAnswer.text: iPads, Chromebooks, corporate phones (iPhone, Samsung, Pixel), laptops (Surface, Dell, HP, Lenovo), and more. If you have it, we can likely fix it. Contact us for any device not listed.

mainEntity.name: How fast is turnaround for bulk orders?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most repairs are completed within 24-48 hours. Business accounts get priority processing. For large fleet orders, we'll provide a timeline estimate upfront.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer ITAD or device recycling?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, we provide secure device disposal with destruction certificates available for compliance. All recycling is done environmentally responsibly.

mainEntity.name: Can you handle repairs other shops can't do?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. We specialize in board-level repairs, microsoldering, and data recovery. If another shop turned you away, bring it to us.

mainEntity.name: How does the bulk device buyback work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Upgrading your fleet? We'll quote your old devices and often pay significantly more than carrier trade-in programs. We accept working, damaged, or broken devices—phones, tablets, laptops, and Chromebooks. Fast payment via E-Transfer or check.

section_1_hero.instructions: Full-width hero section with NO image (text-only centered layout). Contains a LiveStatusBadge area (omit in Astro — static page), tagline, description, and two CTAs. Also includes a pricing note link. Background uses the standard hero gradient.
section_1_hero.headline: Business & Wholesale Repairs
section_1_hero.tagline: Your Trusted Partner for Fleet & Bulk Device Services
section_1_hero.description: From school iPad fleets to corporate upgrades—we handle bulk repairs, refurbishment, and device buyback with volume pricing and free one-way shipping. No minimums.

pricingNote.text: Not sure what affects the cost?

section_2_services_grid.instructions: Section with secondary/30 background. Centered heading and subheading, then a responsive flex-wrap grid of 7 service cards (3 columns on lg, 2 on sm, 1 on mobile). Each card has: icon in primary-tinted rounded-lg container (hover: bg-primary text-white), bold title, description. Below the grid: a centered 'Request Repair' CTA button linking to the external widget.
section_2_services_grid.sectionSubheading: Expert repairs for all Business issues. Fast turnaround, quality parts, and warranty included.

cards.title: Fleet Screen Repairs
cards.description: High-volume screen replacements for iPads, Chromebooks, and phones. Bulk pricing available.

cards.title: Battery Fleet Refresh
cards.description: Keep your device fleet running at full capacity with bulk battery replacements.

cards.title: Board-Level Repairs
cards.description: Advanced microsoldering and logic board repairs that other shops can't handle.

cards.title: Water & Liquid Damage
cards.description: Professional recovery for devices exposed to liquid. Data recovery options available.

cards.title: Device Refurbishment
cards.description: Complete device overhauls—cleaning, repairs, and testing—ready for redeployment.

cards.title: Recycling & ITAD
cards.description: Secure device disposal with asset destruction certificates. Environmentally responsible.

cards.title: Bulk Device Buyback
cards.description: Upgrading your fleet? Get more than carrier trade-in programs for your old devices.

cardStyle.container: w-full sm:w-[calc(50%-12px)] lg:w-[calc(33.333%-16px)] border-border/50 bg-card rounded-lg transition-all hover:border-primary/30 hover:shadow-lg
cardStyle.iconContainer: inline-flex rounded-lg bg-primary/10 p-3 text-primary transition-colors group-hover:bg-primary group-hover:text-primary-foreground
cardStyle.title: text-lg font-semibold

section_3_bulk_buyback.instructions: Highlighted callout section with primary/5 background. Contains a single large card (max-w-4xl, centered) with primary-tinted border and shadow. Inside: icon in circle, heading, subheadline in primary color, body paragraph, checklist of 4 benefits with green checkmark icons, and a CTA button. Single-column layout (no image).
section_3_bulk_buyback.cardStyle: border-primary/20 bg-card shadow-lg p-8 md:p-12 rounded-xl
section_3_bulk_buyback.heading: Upgrading Your Fleet? We'll Buy Your Old Devices
section_3_bulk_buyback.subheadline: Get More Than Carrier Trade-In Programs
section_3_bulk_buyback.body: When your organization upgrades from iPhone 8 to iPhone SE, or swaps out aging iPads for new models, don't leave money on the table. We offer competitive bulk buyback pricing—often significantly more than carrier trade-in programs.
benefits: Phones, tablets, laptops, and Chromebooks accepted
Working, damaged, or broken devices—we quote them all
Fast payment via E-Transfer or check
section_3_bulk_buyback.benefitIconStyle: rounded-full bg-primary/10 p-1 text-primary (check icon h-4 w-4)

section_4_model_categories.instructions: Section with centered heading and subheading. Renders a flex-wrap grid of 3 category cards (centered, max-w-5xl). Each card has: icon in primary circle, bold title, short description, up to 3 model pill badges (with '+N more' badge if > 3 models), and a 'Get Quote' CTA button at the bottom. On hover, the card border turns primary and gains shadow. The CTA button on hover switches to primary bg/text.
section_4_model_categories.sectionHeading: All Business Models We Repair in Winnipeg
section_4_model_categories.sectionSubheading: We specialize in the unique architecture of each Business generation

groups.groupDescription: Bulk classroom device repairs at competitive rates
Keep your workforce connected with fast turnaround
We handle the jobs others can't—microsoldering, data recovery, and more

cardStyle.container: border-border/50 bg-card transition-all hover:border-primary/50 hover:shadow-lg rounded-lg
cardStyle.iconCircle: inline-flex rounded-full bg-primary/10 p-3 text-primary mx-auto
cardStyle.title: text-lg font-semibold text-center

section_5_why_choose_us.instructions: 4-column grid of trust differentiators (2-col on sm, 4-col on lg). Each pillar: icon in a primary-tinted circle, bold title, description. All centered text. These are custom B2B-specific pillars.
section_5_why_choose_us.sectionHeading: The Mobile Tech Lab Advantage: Why We Are Winnipeg's Best
section_5_why_choose_us.sectionSubheading: Why Winnipeg customers consistently choose us for their repairs

pillars.title: Volume Pricing
pillars.description: Competitive bulk rates with no minimum order. The more you send, the more you save.

pillars.title: Free One-Way Shipping
pillars.description: We cover shipping one way—choose a prepaid label to us, or free return shipping to you.

pillars.title: Fast Turnaround
pillars.description: Priority processing for business accounts. Most repairs completed in 24-48 hours.

pillars.title: Trusted Experience
pillars.description: 500+ 5-star reviews. Trusted by schools, businesses, and repair shops across Manitoba.

pillarStyle.iconCircle: mx-auto mb-4 inline-flex rounded-full bg-primary/10 p-4 text-primary
pillarStyle.title: text-lg font-semibold

section_6_ways_to_save.instructions: Section with muted/30 background and a top border. Centered heading with a primary-colored highlight span. Subheading below. Then a 2-column card grid (max-w-4xl). Card 1: Price Match (shield icon, outline CTA linking to tel:). Card 2: Trade-In (refresh icon, primary-tinted CTA linking to /trade-in). Both cards have rounded-2xl borders, hover shadow, and full-width CTA buttons at the bottom.
section_6_ways_to_save.sectionHeading: Worried About Repair Cost? You Have Options.
section_6_ways_to_save.sectionSubheading: Most customers use one of these options to lower their repair cost.

card1_price_match.iconContainerStyle: mx-auto flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10
card1_price_match.title: We'll Match Any Local Repair Price
card1_price_match.body: Found a lower price at another Winnipeg repair shop? We'll match it — so you don't overpay. No pressure. No hassle.
card1_price_match.ctaLabel: Check If We Can Match Your Price

card2_trade_in.iconContainerStyle: mx-auto flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10
card2_trade_in.title: Lower Your Business Repair Cost With a Trade-In
card2_trade_in.body: Trade in phones, tablets, consoles, or laptops — even broken ones — to reduce today's repair cost.
card2_trade_in.secondaryText: Get paid via Cash, E-Transfer, or Store Credit

section_6_ways_to_save.cardStyle: rounded-2xl border border-border/50 bg-card shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

section_7_locations.instructions: This section is identical across all repair pages. Use the exact data below — do not change any copy, hours, phone numbers, or addresses. This page does NOT show a mail-in card (showMailInCard=false), so render only the 2 location cards in a 2-column grid.
section_7_locations.sectionHeading: Device Repair Locations in Winnipeg & Manitoba
section_7_locations.sectionSubheading: Two convenient locations to serve you. Walk-ins welcome or book your appointment online.
section_7_locations.serviceAreaNote: We serve businesses across Manitoba and Canada. Free one-way shipping on all B2B orders.

locations.name: Thompson Location
locations.address: 300 Mystery Lake Rd #1530, Thompson, MB R8N 0M2

section_8_faq.instructions: Render FAQs as a native <details>/<summary> accordion — no JavaScript. Must match seo.faqSchema exactly — same 7 questions and answers. Wrap in a section with centered heading.
section_8_faq.sectionSubheading: Common questions about Business repair at Mobile Tech Lab
section_8_faq.note: Copy FAQ items exactly from seo.faqSchema.mainEntity — do not generate new items. There are 7 FAQ items.

accordionStyle.summary: cursor-pointer py-4 text-left font-medium text-foreground hover:text-primary

section_9_sticky_cta.instructions: Fixed bottom bar visible only on mobile (md:hidden). Contains two equal-width buttons: Call and Text. Stays fixed at bottom of viewport with backdrop blur.
section_9_sticky_cta.style: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 border-t border-border bg-background/95 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm md:hidden

shared_layout.instructions: Wrap the entire page in the shared site layout. The layout includes: sticky header with navigation, desktop CTA, footer with links, and the mobile sticky CTA bar.
shared_layout.header: Shared site header — use the same header component as all other pages
shared_layout.footer: Shared site footer — use the same footer component as all other pages
shared_layout.mainTag: Wrap all sections in <main class='flex-1 pb-20 md:pb-0'> — pb-20 on mobile to clear the sticky CTA bar

validation_checklist.instructions: Before returning the built Astro page, verify every item on this list is true
checks: faqSchema items match section_8_faq content exactly
section_7_locations data is identical to the provided constants — not paraphrased
All external links use target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
Sticky CTA bar is md:hidden only
No placeholder text — every string field has real content
Only one <h1> tag on the entire page
Output is valid HTML — no unclosed tags, no React/JSX syntax
Zero client-side JavaScript — FAQ uses native <details>/<summary>
